mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, USER_ID AS userId, RULE_ID AS ruleId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, REMIND_DATE AS remindDate, CHANNEL AS channel, STATUS AS status, SNOOZE_UNTIL AS snoozeUntil, SNOOZE_COUNT AS snoozeCount, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM CHECKIN_REMINDER_LOGS WHERE RULE_ID = #{ruleId} AND REMIND_DATE = #{remindDate}

SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, USER_ID AS userId, RULE_ID AS ruleId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, REMIND_DATE AS remindDate, CHANNEL AS channel, STATUS AS status, SNOOZE_UNTIL AS snoozeUntil, SNOOZE_COUNT AS snoozeCount, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM CHECKIN_REMINDER_LOGS WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHECKIN_REMINDER_LOGS ( LOG_ID, USER_ID, RULE_ID, CHECKIN_TYPE, REMIND_DATE, CHANNEL, STATUS, SNOOZE_UNTIL, SNOOZE_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{userId}, #{ruleId}, #{checkinType}, #{remindDate}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{snoozeUntil}, #{snoozeCount}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE CHECKIN_REMINDER_LOGS SET STATUS = #{status}, SNOOZE_UNTIL = #{snoozeUntil}, SNOOZE_COUNT = #{snoozeCount}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
